title: Expecting all properties to be returned when creating a TRACK LAYOUT
gherkin:
When the user creates a "TRACK LAYOUT" "GP Circuit" with the following data
  | key                   | value      |
  | name                  | GP Circuit |
  | year_from             | 1967       |
  | year_to               | 1999       |
  | length                | 5.397      |
  | length_unit           | km         |
  | direction             | clockwise  |
  | elevation_change      | 73         |
  | elevation_change_unit | m          |
  | surface               | asphalt    |
Then the response should contain the following properties
  | key                   | value      |
  | name                  | GP Circuit |
  | year_from             | 1967       |
  | year_to               | 1999       |
  | length                | 5.397      |
  | length_unit           | km         |
  | direction             | clockwise  |
  | elevation_change      | 73         |
  | elevation_change_unit | m          |
  | surface               | asphalt    |
